title: Uncovering Machiavellian Attitudes Among Accounting Students: A Descriptive Review
author: Sari, Rusmita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: ABSTRACT :  This study was conducted to determine the opinions of students as prospective accounting professionals aware of Machiavellian traits and take steps to reduce their negative impact on ethical behavior. The method used in this study is descriptive. Data were collected by distributing questionnaires to respondents, namely accounting students at FEB Untan. The questionnaire contained 16 questions using a Likert scale. The findings of this study indicate that students' opinions do not tend towards Machiavellian behavior.
